service.name: Segment API (Twilio)
service.description_for_ai: Customer Data Platform. Collect user events once, send to 450+ destinations (analytics, CRM, email, ads). Single tracking code for all tools. Used by IBM, Intuit, FOX. Use for unified analytics, customer data routing.

auth.note: Write Key as username, empty password
auth.how_to_get: Workspace → Sources → Your Source → Settings → API Keys

capabilities.description_for_ai: Track a user event and send to all 450+ connected destinations simultaneously. One call routes to analytics, CRM, email, ads, and more.

userId.description: Unique user identifier (your internal ID). Use anonymousId for pre-login users.

anonymousId.description: Anonymous user ID (UUID) for users without an account. Use one or the other with userId.

event.description: Event name. Use noun+verb pattern: 'Order Completed', 'Product Added', 'User Signed Up', 'Page Viewed'

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 event time. Defaults to server receive time.

fields: HTTP 200 with empty body on success

capabilities.description_for_ai: Update user profile traits in Segment. Syncs to CRM, email tools, and analytics. Call after login or whenever user attributes change.

traits.description: User attributes: {email, name, firstName, lastName, phone, company: {name, id}, plan: 'pro', createdAt: '2024-01-01', address: {city, country}}

fields: HTTP 200 with empty body on success
